name: Trivy
description: Open source vulnerability scanner for containers, filesystems, Git repositories, Kubernetes clusters, and cloud infrastructure

auth_config.description: Token configured via --token flag when starting Trivy server

actions.name: Scan Container Image
actions.description: Submit a container image for vulnerability scanning via Trivy server

parameters.name: target
parameters.description: Container image name with tag (e.g., nginx:1.25)

parameters.name: artifact_type
parameters.description: Type of artifact to scan: container_image, filesystem, repository

actions.name: Get Server Version
actions.description: Retrieve the Trivy server version and vulnerability database information

actions.name: Scan SBOM
actions.description: Scan a Software Bill of Materials document for vulnerabilities

parameters.name: target
parameters.description: Path or content of SBOM file (CycloneDX or SPDX format)

actions.name: List Image Vulnerabilities
actions.description: Scan and retrieve vulnerability list for a container image including CVE details

parameters.name: vuln_type
parameters.description: Vulnerability types to scan: os, library

parameters.name: severity
parameters.description: Minimum severity filter: UNKNOWN, LOW, MEDIUM, HIGH, CRITICAL
